The following function has a bug. Find and fix the single buggy line. Return the complete corrected function. Do NOT reformat, rename variables, add comments, or change any other line.

def get_page(items, page, per_page=10):
    """Return a page of items (1-indexed)."""
    start = (page - 1) * per_page
    end = page * per_page + 1
    return items[start:end]
